channel.title: TimerErTim Blog
channel.description: Online portfolio and blogs for everything technical

item.title: My workshop about Typst for the fhLUG in Campus Hagenberg
item.description: On June 8th, 2026, I had the wonderful opportunity to lead a Typst workshop for the fh Linux User Group at Campus Hagenberg, made possible by Daniel Knittl-Frank's excellent organization. It was a fantastic experience, with enthusiastic and engaged participants. In this blog post, you'll find highlights from the workshop as well as access to the full recording (German).
item.author: Tim Peko (TimerErTim)

item.title: Writing a static blog with Typst
item.description: Let's dive into the world of Typst and see how we can use it to power this very blog website. We will investigate potential solutions, the custom build process I settled on and the technologies necessary. For static hosting highly efficient compression and patching is necessary. Or in other words: How to proberly misuse Typst for everthing.
item.author: Tim Peko (TimerErTim)
